title: Software Engineer
description:
This role has been designed as ‘Hybrid’ with an expectation that you will work on average 2 days per week from an HPE office.
   

  

**Who We Are**
 Hewlett Packard Enterprise is the global edge\\-to\\-cloud company advancing the way people live and work. We help companies connect, protect, analyze, and act on their data and applications wherever they live, from edge to cloud, so they can turn insights into outcomes at the speed required to thrive in today’s complex world. Our culture thrives on finding new and better ways to accelerate what’s next. We know varied backgrounds are valued and succeed here. We have the flexibility to manage our work and personal needs. We make bold moves, together, and are a force for good. If you are looking to stretch and grow your career our culture will embrace you. Open up opportunities with HPE.
   

  

**Job Description**
***Job Family Definition:***
 Designs, develops, troubleshoots and debugs software programs for software enhancements and new products. Develops software including operating systems, compilers, routers, networks, utilities, databases and Internet\\-related tools. Determines hardware compatibility and/or influences hardware design.
   

  

**Management Level Definition**
 Contributes to assignments of limited scope by applying technical concepts and theoretical knowledge acquired through specialized training, education, or previous experience. Acts as team member by providing information, analysis and recommendations in support of team efforts. Exercises independent judgment within defined parameters.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Codes and programs enhancements, updates, and changes for portions and subsystems of systems software, including operating systems, compliers, networking, utilities, databases, and Internet\\-related tools
* Executes established test plans and protocols for assigned portions of code; identifies, logs, and debugs assigned issues.
* Develops understanding of and relationship with internal and outsourced development partners on software systems design and development.
* Participates as a member of project team of other software systems engineers and internal and outsourced development partners to develop reliable, cost effective and high quality solutions for low to moderately\\- complex products.


**Education And Experience Required**
* Bachelor's or Master's degree in Computer Science, Information Systems, or equivalent
* Typically 0\\-2 years experience


**Knowledge And Skills**
* Experience or understanding of software systems design tools and languages.
* Good analytical and problem solving skills.
* Understanding of design for software systems running on multiple platform types
* Understanding of basic testing, coding, and debugging procedures
* Good written and verbal communication skills; mastery in English and local language.


**Additional Skills**
 Cloud Architectures, Cross Domain Knowledge, Design Thinking, Development Fundamentals, DevOps, Distributed Computing, Microservices Fluency, Full Stack Development, Security\\-First Mindset, Solutions Design, Testing \\& Automation, User Experience (UX)
   

  

**What We Can Offer You**
**Health \\& Wellbeing**
 We strive to provide our team members and their loved ones with a comprehensive suite of benefits that supports their physical, financial and emotional wellbeing.
   

  

**Personal \\& Professional Development**
 We also invest in your career because the better you are, the better we all are. We have specific programs catered to helping you reach any career goals you have — whether you want to become a knowledge expert in your field or apply your skills to another division.
   

  

**Unconditional Inclusion**
 We are unconditionally inclusive in the way we work and celebrate individual uniqueness. We know varied backgrounds are valued and succeed here. We have the flexibility to manage our work and personal needs. We make bold moves, together, and are a force for good.
   

  

**Let's Stay Connected**
 Follow @HPECareers on Instagram to see the latest on people, culture and tech at HPE.
   

  

**Job**
 Engineering
   

  

**Job Level**
 TCP\\_01
   

  

 HPE is an Equal Employment Opportunity/ Veterans/Disabled/LGBT employer. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, gender, or any other protected category, and all decisions we make are made on the basis of qualifications, merit, and business need. Our goal is to be one global team that is representative of our customers, in an inclusive environment where we can continue to innovate and grow together. Please click here: Equal Employment Opportunity.

title: Software Engineer (Fullstack)
description:
*Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India*
**Come thrive at Tandems!** 
 We build intelligent solutions that reimagine how advice is delivered, how institutions operate, and how expertise is unlocked at scale. Our AI\\-enabled platform empowers advisors, bankers, and agents with deeper insights, personalized recommendations, and more time to focus on guiding clients through life’s most important decisions. We are pioneering Finance With Intelligence, where technology amplifies human impact instead of replacing it.
   

  

 Through partnerships with some of the world’s largest and most innovative financial institutions like Wells Fargo, Citizens Bank and ScotiaBank, we seek to help our clients make better financial decisions.
   

  

**About The Team And Opportunity**
 The Engineering Team designs, builds, and maintains the systems that power Tandems’ AI\\-enabled platform, which reimagines how financial advice is delivered, how institutions operate, and how advisors help clients succeed. We build:
   

  

* Client\\-facing applications that enable seamless onboarding, personalized advice, and digital collaboration
* Algorithms and investment systems that support smarter portfolio management and better financial outcomes
* AI\\-powered tools that give advisors intelligent insights, streamline workflows, and enhance client engagement across our products: TandemsInvest, TandemsMeet, and TandemsGrow


 As a Software Engineer (Fullstack) at Tandems, you’ll play a crucial role in designing and shipping high\\-impact features across our product suite — from frontend user experiences to backend services. You’ll use modern engineering practices and AI\\-assisted development tools to build faster, smarter, and with higher quality.
   

  

**Why Work for Us**
* As a reliable and trusted financial solutions provider with expanding reach to 1 in 3 households nationwide, we believe it takes extraordinary people to disrupt decades of legacy financial practices to reimagine solutions that serve customers at scale.
* We are 100\\+ employees strong and steadily building. Our world\\-class team is growing with an industry\\-savvy board and strategic executive team guiding us forward
* We offer competitive benefits that include Flexible PTO, Wellness benefit, Mobile/Internet subsidy, Employee Recognition Programs, and more!
* We are a remote\\-first company! We have regional hubs nationwide, with presence in 4 Countries: United States, Canada, India, and Singapore.
* We believe that one size fits one and embrace a culture that honors and celebrates diversity of backgrounds, approaches and experiences
* We are guided by our core values: Customer Delight, Make It Happen, Think Big, and We Over Me. Read more about our core values and how we live them every day on our website here.


**How You’ll Make An Impact**
* Build, test, and deploy new product features end\\-to\\-end — from intuitive UI components to performant APIs
* Leverage AI\\-assisted tools (e.g., Cursor, GitHub Copilot, Claude Code) to accelerate development, improve quality, and explore new ideas
* Collaborate with product managers, designers, and QA to ship secure, compliant, and delightful user experiences
* Use sound engineering judgment to prioritize impact, balancing speed with quality and maintainability
* Identify and drive improvements in performance, reliability, and scalability across the stack
* Contribute to our shared culture of ownership — taking responsibility for solving problems, not just writing code
* Help build AI\\-enabled features within our products by integrating large language models (LLMs) to make user experiences smarter and more personalized


**Ideal Person for this Role**
* Core Engineering Skills:
* 3\\+ years of software engineering experience with production systems
* Strong proficiency in one or more of: Python, Java/Scala (Spring), PHP (Laravel), or JavaScript/TypeScript (React)
* Experience designing and consuming RESTful or GraphQL APIs
* Understanding of cloud environments (AWS preferred) and CI/CD practices
* Strong problem\\-solving skills and attention to detail, with a focus on scalability and maintainability
* Comfort with using AI\\-powered developer tools to improve speed, quality, and creativity
* Excellent communication and collaboration skills in a cross\\-functional, agile environment
* Bonus Skills (Nice to Have):
* Experience with AI application frameworks (LangChain, LlamaIndex, Google’s Agent Development Kit (ADK))
* Exposure to prompt engineering or integrating LLM APIs (OpenAI, Anthropic, AWS Bedrock)
* Familiarity with vector databases or retrieval\\-augmented generation (RAG) concepts
* Interest in building AI\\-enabled features that enhance productivity or client experiences


**Perks And Benefits**
* Tax\\-friendly Compensation
* Liberal Leave Policy
* Medical cover for the family, including parents
* Quarterly Wellness Benefit
* WFH Allowance
* Mobile/Internet subsidy (for smooth WFH experience)
* Employee Referral Program
* Employee Recognition Program
* And more!


 Tandems is backed by premier venture capital firms, including Bain Capital Ventures, General Atlantic, Nyca Partners, and Union Square Ventures as well as leading financial institutions including Wells Fargo, UBS, Santander, New York Life, and Comerica. We've raised over $100 million to support our growth as a leading technology provider to financial institutions.

We do not discriminate on the basis of race, religion, color, gender identity, sexual orientation, age, disability, veteran status, or other applicable legally protected characteristics. As a Team Lead, you will play a key role in mentoring team members, managing projects, and prioritizing tasks to ensure successful and timely delivery. Your leadership will be crucial in fostering a supportive team environment and driving the team towards achieving our goals.

 the way.

 We’re proud of our diverse team of 2,200\\+ employees in 50 locations across 25 countries around the world. No matter where you are, you’ll work with people who care about your success and get the support you need to unlock new heights in your career.

 , we are on a mission to become the default transactional database for enterprises building cloud\\-native applications.  At Yugabyte, we are on a mission to become the default transactional database for enterprises building cloud\\-native applications. title: Founding Engineer, Integrations
description:
Build our agentic services platform from zero to one. Own backend architecture from initial concept through production deployment to enterprise scale.
   

  

**About This Role**
 We're looking for an Integrations Engineer to own and expand the connective tissue of our platform. You'll be responsible for researching, designing, and building integrations that allow Cenna's agentic platform to interact with enterprise systems — from authentication providers and SSO solutions to SaaS applications and LLM model providers. **Requirements**

* Hands\\-on experience with authentication protocols: OAuth 2\\.0, SAML, OIDC, JWT
* Experience implementing SSO solutions and working with identity providers (Okta, Azure AD, Auth0, etc.)

**Nice to Haves**

title: GTM Engineer
description:
**3–5 Years Of Experience**
**About the Role**
 Lyzr AI is hiring a GTM Engineer to architect and scale an automation\\-native growth engine. This is a systems engineering role applied to go\\-to\\-market.
   

  

 You will design programmable GTM infrastructure that connects paid acquisition, CRM logic, enrichment layers, agent workflows, and analytics pipelines into a unified, automation\\-driven system.
   

  

 We are looking for someone who has built real automations on Make.com and n8n, is comfortable working with APIs and webhooks, can prototype logic using tools like Cursor, and understands how to deploy lightweight agents that drive operational efficiency.
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
- Design and implement advanced automation workflows using Make.com and n8n, connecting Ad platforms, CRM systems, enrichment tools, and analytics dashboards into a cohesive GTM stack.

- Build API\\-driven integrations using webhooks, custom endpoints, and automation logic to eliminate manual lead processing, routing, enrichment, and follow\\-ups.

- Develop and deploy lightweight GTM agents that:

* Analyze funnel performance
* Trigger actions based on performance thresholds
* Generate automated campaign summaries
* Identify optimization opportunities
* Route high\\-intent accounts dynamically
* Prototype and build automation logic using Cursor or similar coding environments, writing scripts where needed to extend workflow capabilities.
* Own and optimize paid acquisition channels such as LinkedIn, Google, and Meta, ensuring every campaign is integrated into CRM workflows and tied directly to pipeline and revenue metrics.
* Engineer the full funnel from impression to revenue, implementing automated lead scoring, lifecycle transitions, qualification logic, and retargeting triggers.
* Build and maintain centralized dashboards that unify data from ads, HubSpot, and product analytics to track CAC, funnel velocity, pipeline contribution, and payback period.
* Create automated reporting systems that push real\\-time performance summaries and alerts to Slack or internal tools without manual intervention.
* Continuously design structured experiments across targeting, creative, landing pages, and automation logic to improve efficiency and conversion performance.
* Collaborate with marketing, sales, and product teams to ensure automation systems reflect real customer behavior and support scalable growth.


**What You’ll Need**
* 3–5 years of experience in growth engineering, marketing automation, performance marketing, or GTM systems roles in SaaS or high\\-growth environments.
* Strong hands\\-on experience building automation workflows on Make.com and/or n8n, including multi\\-step flows, branching logic, API calls, and webhook triggers.
* Comfort working directly with APIs, JSON payloads, data mapping, and custom integrations across tools.
* Experience using Cursor or similar coding environments to write scripts, prototype logic, or build lightweight automation extensions.
* Proven experience building real automation systems that materially reduced manual GTM effort or improved funnel efficiency.
* Strong paid acquisition experience across LinkedIn Ads, Google Ads, and/or Meta Ads with clear accountability for performance and pipeline impact.
* Deep understanding of B2B SaaS funnel metrics including CTR, CPC, MQL, SQL, CAC, LTV, conversion rates, and pipeline velocity.
* Hands\\-on experience with HubSpot or equivalent CRM platforms, including workflows, lifecycle management, segmentation, and advanced reporting.
* Strong analytical capabilities with experience building dashboards that connect acquisition, CRM, and revenue data.
* A systems\\-first mindset with a bias toward automation, ownership, experimentation, and technical problem\\-solving.


**Why Lyzr AI**
* Build programmable GTM infrastructure from the ground up with full ownership.
* Work at the intersection of automation, AI agents, APIs, and revenue systems.
* Operate in a fast\\-paced, execution\\-driven environment that values technical depth and measurable impact.
* Be part of a company building enterprise AI agent infrastructure and reflect that philosophy in our own growth systems.


 Lyzr AI is building the operating system for AI\\-native enterprises. The GTM Engineer will ensure our go\\-to\\-market engine is automated, intelligent, and engineered for scale.

description:
**Project Role :** 
 Packaged/SaaS Application Engineer
   

  

**Project Role Description :** 
 Configure and support packaged or SaaS applications to adapt features, manage releases, and ensure system stability. Use standard tools, APIs, and low\\-code platforms to align solutions with business needs while preserving compatibility and performance.
   

  

**Must have skills :** 
 Selenium
   

  

**Good to have skills :** 
 Personal Insurance
   

  

**Minimum 3 Year(s) Of Experience Is Required**
**Educational Qualification :** 
 15 years full time education
   

  

 Summary:
   

  

 As a Packaged/SaaS Application Engineer, you will engage in configuring and supporting packaged or Software as a Service applications. Your typical day will involve adapting features to meet business requirements, managing software releases, and ensuring the stability of systems. You will utilize standard tools, application programming interfaces, and low\\-code platforms to align solutions with organizational needs while maintaining compatibility and performance across various systems. Your role will require collaboration with cross\\-functional teams to identify and implement enhancements that drive efficiency and effectiveness in application usage.
   

  

 Roles \\& Responsibilities:
   

  

* Expected to perform independently and become an SME.
* Required active participation/contribution in team discussions.
* Contribute in providing solutions to work related problems.
* Assist in troubleshooting and resolving application issues to ensure optimal performance.
* Collaborate with stakeholders to gather requirements and translate them into technical specifications.


 Professional \\& Technical Skills:
   

  

* Must To Have Skills: Proficiency in Selenium.
* Good To Have Skills: Experience with Personal Insurance.
* Strong understanding of automated testing frameworks and methodologies.
* Experience in developing and executing test scripts for web applications.
* Familiarity with continuous integration and continuous deployment practices.


 Additional Information:
   

  

* The candidate should have minimum 3 years of experience in Selenium.
* This position is based at our Bengaluru office.
* A 15 years full time education is required.
